---
name: Maintainer Application
about: Apply to become the official maintainer of a specific integration.
title: "[APP]: <Integration Name>"
labels: ["maintainer-application"]
---

**Which integration do you want to maintain?**
(e.g., AWS CloudWatch)

**Why do you want to maintain this?**
(e.g., I use it daily at my job and want to keep it updated.)

**What is your experience with Zabbix?**
(Briefly describe your background.)

**Agreement**
- [ ] I agree to respond to broken reports for this integration.
- [ ] I agree to keep the documentation updated.
